About Services Work Comics Now Milestones Archive Get in touch

Sebastian Weirsøe Flamant — Copenhagen

Digital leader.
Comic translator.
Product builder.

I've spent twenty years building digital products and teams — at Trustpilot, Kahoot!, Organic Basics and others. On the side: half-French, cand.mag. in Danish, 100+ comic books translated across 23 series. Now building my own things through Flamant Studio. Evenings and weekends. Deliberately.

See my work Get in touch
Currently: Personal Shopper app
The human behind it all

Hey —
here I am.

52 years old, married to Stine, three kids, one dog, one cat. Living in Brønshøj, Copenhagen. Not particularly mysterious.

In both my professional and personal life I try to live by a few simple principles: strength, integrity, compassion and quality. I particularly enjoy working on website design and ongoing digital management — I find real satisfaction in clear usability, great communication and results you can actually measure. I enjoy making pretty things that matter.

Lately I've been deep in AI — as everyone else, sure, but I've found genuine new inspiration through it. I'm currently running on Claude as my primary tool and working on a number of AI-powered projects, including building my own product studio from scratch. Evenings and weekends. Deliberately.

What I offer

Let's work
together.

Twenty years of building digital products, leading teams and making things work. Here's how I can help you.

📈

Digital Growth Consultancy

Strategic guidance for companies looking to grow their digital presence, ecommerce performance and online revenue. From roadmap to execution.

🤖

AI & Org Transformation

Helping leadership teams navigate the AI age — workflow automation, team structure, process redesign and responsible implementation.

🧭

Career Mentoring

Personal mentoring for digital professionals navigating career transitions, leadership roles or building their own thing. Direct, honest, experience-based.

🪑

Board Roles

Open to advisory and board positions where digital expertise, ecommerce experience and an honest outside perspective would add genuine value.

🎤

Speaking & Teaching

Available for lectures, guest teaching and keynotes on digital leadership, ecommerce in practice, AI in the workplace and building products from scratch.

Interested in working together? Based in Copenhagen, working in Danish and English.

Get in touch
What I do

Lots of hats.
One studio.

🛍️

Ecommerce & Digital Growth

Twenty years in digital commerce — running teams, owning roadmaps, caring obsessively about conversion. Currently Head of Ecommerce at Organic Basics. Previously Global Digital Director at Trustpilot and Kahoot!. I've done the hard miles.

🏗️

Product Development

Currently building Personal Shopper — a taste-driven shopping board for Europe with no ads, ever. I design, spec and ship from scratch, with AI agents doing the heavy lifting. This is what evenings and weekends look like when you're slightly obsessed.

🌐

Organisation & Consultancy

Helping leadership and digital teams get the fundamentals right — strategy, structure, prioritisation, roadmapping. I've worked across telco, audio, SaaS and fashion at director level. Sometimes the most valuable thing is a fresh pair of eyes and someone who'll tell you what's actually going on.

📖

Translation

French → Danish translation for Forlaget Zoom since 2014. Over 100 titles and counting — Franco-Belgian bandes dessinées ranging from detective noir to sci-fi to old-school adventure. Being half-French with a cand.mag. in Danish turns out to be a fairly specific skill set.

Career

Twenty years.
Still not bored.

Started as a website manager in 2003. Ended up as global digital director at a London-listed company. The through-line is always the same: good work, good people, making things that actually matter.

2023 — Now
Organic Basics

Head of Ecommerce

Leading digital commerce for the Copenhagen-based sustainable fashion brand. Full ownership of the ecommerce roadmap, conversion, and digital team.

2021 — 2023
Kahoot!

Digital Director

Led digital strategy and web operations for the global learning platform. Overseeing website experience across markets and driving digital-led growth.

2018 — 2021
Trustpilot

Global Digital Director

Global ownership of digital presence for one of the world's leading review platforms. Web strategy, CRO, global team leadership across multiple markets.

2015 — 2018
Libratone

Head of Ecommerce

Built and led ecommerce for the Danish premium audio brand. D2C strategy, international expansion, digital experience ownership.

2011 — 2015
Telenor DK

Head of Online Operations

Led online operations for Denmark's major telco. Managing the digital customer journey, web platform and cross-functional digital teams.

2008 — 2011
Zenji / Hi3G

Website Manager

Managed digital presence for the Danish mobile operator. Foundation in web strategy, UX and digital project delivery.

Early career

Digital Project Manager & Website Manager

Built the foundations in digital project delivery, web management and stakeholder collaboration across multiple organisations.

Translation work

100+ comics.
French → Danish.

I'm half-French and hold a cand.mag. in Danish — which turns out to be a fairly specific skill set. Since 2014 I've translated Franco-Belgian bandes dessinées for Forlaget Zoom, Denmark's leading comics publisher. The work covers detective noir, sci-fi, classic adventure and everything in between.

All titles published by Forlaget Zoom. Available at Saxo, Bog&Idé, Faraos Cigarer and all major Danish bookshops.

Currently

What I'm
working on.

Evenings and weekends. Building in public, thinking out loud, shipping slowly but deliberately.

Active build

Personal Shopper

A taste-driven shopping board for European consumers. No ads, ever. Affiliate-funded, subscription-gated assistant layer. Next.js + Supabase, AI-augmented development.

Build progress
In progress

NBRHOOD

An iOS app exploring neighbourhood discovery and local connection. React Native. Queued behind Personal Shopper.

Build progress
Background

ECHO

A novel. Written under the pen name Mara Ellis. Literary fiction. Slow going, intentionally.

Draft progress
Ongoing

Comic translation

Active translation work for Forlaget Zoom. New titles regularly in the pipeline. The longest-running thread in the Flamant portfolio.

~60 titles done
Milestones

Things worth
remembering.

2025

Launched Flamant Studio — started building Personal Shopper with AI agents

First product: a taste-driven shopping board for Europe. Full AI-augmented development pipeline with three specialist agents (PM, Backend, Frontend).

2023

Joined Organic Basics as Head of Ecommerce

Leading digital commerce for Copenhagen's most ethically-minded fashion brand. Full P&L and team ownership.

2021

Kahoot! — Digital Director

Part of the digital leadership team at one of Norway's most recognised tech brands, scaling web presence globally.

2020

Goju-Ryu karate 1. Dan — black belt

Years of training, one very satisfying exam. The discipline carries over into everything else.

2018

Global Digital Director at Trustpilot

First global director role. Overseeing digital across all major markets for one of the world's most recognised trust platforms.

2015

Head of Ecommerce at Libratone

Built the D2C ecommerce capability from the ground up for the Danish premium audio brand.

2014

First comic book translation published by Forlaget Zoom

Beginning of a long-running collaboration. Jerome K. Jerome Bloche series — now 11 volumes.

2011

Head of Online Operations at Telenor DK

First head-of role. Led the digital customer journey for Denmark's major telco.

~2003

Started in digital — project manager and website manager

Two decades in. First roles in digital project management and website operations, building the foundation for everything that followed.

Est. 2003

A trip down
memory lane.

Before Trustpilot, Kahoot! and Organic Basics — there was flamant.dk. Built by hand in Copenhagen, in Dreamweaver, on a dial-up connection. Twenty years of web in five screenshots.

flamant.dk — april 2003
2003
Den kedelige mand

The original flamant.dk. Written in the third person. Tracked monthly statistics including cola intake (13.5 litres), toilet seat incidents (149.2/month) and satisfaction rating (78%). Navigation via five icon categories: personalia, arbejde, statistik, vejviser, schtroumpf. Absolutely unhinged.

HTML 4.0Table layoutDreamweaverIE5
flamant.dk — juni 2004
2004
Dr. Schtroumpf — rollespillernes superhelt

The Schtroumpf section referenced ominously on the front page ('jeg advarer mod stærke indtryk'). A superhero splash page for an alter ego: 'nattens engel, de retfærdiges beskytter.' Comic-book movie poster aesthetic, Comics Code seal, 50¢ price tag. 'Now in Dolby Maxi-Color.'

PHPMySQLComic designDolby Maxi-Color
flamant.dk — oktober 2007
2007
Flamant Punktum DK

The redesign that retired the kedelige mand. 'Desværre var det også ret kedeligt at skrive tekster til siden, for i virkeligheden er jeg ikke specielt umorsom.' B&W photo, five-colour sidebar, Times New Roman. Signed off: 'Og tak fordi De ikke gøgler.'

PHP + MySQLCMS from scratch760px fixedB&W photo
flamant.dk — august 2013
2013
Flamant Tekst — oversætter & webchef

The professional pivot. Personal chaos gives way to a clean services site — translation, copywriting, web. David Harder's flamingo illustration appears for the first time. The same character who lives on today's site.

WordPressDavid HarderFirst flamingoClean & minimal
flamant.dk — august 2019
2019
Flamant Tekst — oversættelse, tekst og web

The most recent previous version. David's original flamingo banner still centre stage. 'FLAMANT Tekst v. Sebastian Weirsøe Flamant: oversætter, teksttosse, websitesnedker, dansk-fransk ninja, projektleder, nørd og good guy siden 2010 (ninja dog siden 1973).'

WordPressFlamingo bannerTranslation focus
Get in touch

Say hello.
I don't bite.

Whether it's consultancy, a translation job, a collaboration, or you just want to talk shop about ecommerce or comics — drop me a line. I'm in Copenhagen, I work in Danish, French and English, and I'm usually pretty quick to reply.

✉ [email protected] in LinkedIn — Sebastian Flamant 𝕏 @hidaseb 📚 Forlaget Zoom — translation work
